failed_attempts:
let f (n : ℕ) : ℚ × ℚ × ℚ :=
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    (-(k + 1) / k ^ 2, -(k ^ 2 + k), k / (k + 1) ^ 2)
  refine Set.Infinite.mono ?_ (Set.infinite_range_of_injective f ?_)
  · rintro _ ⟨n, rfl⟩
    dsimp only [f]
    let k : ℚ := n + 2
    have hk : k ≥ 2 := by simp [k]; linarith
    have hx : -(k + 1) / k ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by
      rw [ne_eq, div_eq_one_iff_eq (by nlinarith)]; nlinarith
    have hy : -(k ^ 2 + k) ≠ 1 := by nlinarith
    have hz : k / (k + 1) ^ 2 ≠ 1 := by
      rw [ne_eq, div_eq_one_iff_eq (by nlinarith)]; nlinarith
    refine ⟨⟨hx, hy, hz⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
    · field_simp; ring
    · simp only [div_pow]
      field_simp [sub_ne_zero.mpr hx, sub_ne_zero.mpr hy, sub_ne_zero.mpr hz]
      ring
  · intro n m h
    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at h
    have h := h.2.1
    nlinarith
